location: Palm Beach County Courthouse, West Palm Beach FL
text: Epstein pleads guilty June 30, 2008 before Judge McSorley — adjudicated sexual offender, sentenced to 18 months PBCJ + probation.

location: Palm Beach International Airport, West Palm Beach FL
text: USAO timeline: Epstein's Boeing 727 lands at PBIA June 20, 2004 with a passenger documented as 16 years old.

location: Palm Beach International Airport, West Palm Beach FL
text: PBSO timeline: Epstein departs PBIA July 19, 2004 on Boeing 727 with three unnamed female passengers.

location: Palm Beach County Courthouse, West Palm Beach FL
text: USAO victim notification letter confirms Epstein's Dec 14, 2007 guilty plea before Judge McSorley, Courtroom IIF.

location: Lunt-Fontanne Theatre, 205 West 46th Street, New York, NY 10036
text: Epstein and unnamed 'girls' driven to Donna Summer Broadway show; 5 tickets on his Amex.
